message:
feat(fnp-python): expose __version__ and numpy top-level constants (br-franken_numpy-k74v.7, br-franken_numpy-k74v.6)

k74v.7 — __version__ export
  m.add("__version__", env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION"))?;
  Sources the value from the fnp-python crate's Cargo.toml at compile
  time so a workspace version bump propagates automatically.

k74v.6 — 6 numpy top-level constants
  pi, e, euler_gamma  : f64 with numpy-matching values
  inf                 : f64::INFINITY
  nan                 : f64::NAN
  little_endian       : cfg!(target_endian = "little")

Tests (both in fnp-python lib tests):
- module_exposes_version_matching_cargo_pkg_version: asserts __version__
  is non-empty, dotted, and equals env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION").
- module_exposes_numpy_top_level_constants_matching_numpy: asserts each
  constant matches its expected intrinsic value AND (when numpy is
  importable) agrees with numpy.<const> within 1e-15. nan compared via
  is_nan() since NaN != NaN. inf/little_endian compared via equality.

Verified via rch exec -- cargo test -p fnp-python --lib module_exposes:
  2 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; finished in 0.27s (exit 0 in 37s total
  including remote compile + artifact pull).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
